shorts.title_distilled: ​‘The Office US’ cast: Where the Dunder Mifflin folks are now​.
shorts.description: Over ten years since the last episode, ‘The Office US’ is still one of the all-time favorites. This mockumentary about the oddball staff at Dunder Mifflin in Scranton, Pennsylvania, first hit screens in 2005 and stuck around for nine seasons, wrapping up in 2…

shorts.title: NWS issues thunderstorm watches for NEPA
shorts.title_distilled: NWS issues thunderstorm watches for NEPA.
shorts.description: (WBRE/WYOU) — Our next storm system is expected to hit Pennsylvania through the rest of Sunday into Sunday night. Widespread showers may continue through Sunday evening and the early part of the overnight hours. There is a chance of a strong to severe thunderstorm. Hail, damaging winds, and heavy downpours are the primary concerns, although [...]
shorts.content: (WBRE/WYOU) — Our next storm system is expected to hit Pennsylvania through the rest of Sunday into Sunday night. Widespread showers may continue through Sunday evening and the early part of the overnight hours. There is a chance of a strong to severe thunderstorm. Hail, damaging winds, and heavy downpours are the primary concerns, although [...]

shorts.title: Vendors, bargain hunters take over drive-in for Circle Flea Fair
shorts.title_distilled: Vendors, bargain hunters take over drive-in for Circle Flea Fair.
shorts.description: DICKSON CITY, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — Here's a sure sign of spring: A local flea market is up and running. Vendors and bargain hunters took over the Circle Drive-In on Sunday near Scranton for what's billed as Circle Flea Fair. The flea market debuted at the theater grounds in 1970. 28/22 News found new and [...]

shorts.title: Lizards on display at 10th Electric City Reptile Expo
shorts.title_distilled: Lizards on display at 10th Electric City Reptile Expo.
shorts.description: SCRANTON, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — Finding reptiles in a hotel is usually not a good thing, unless it's part of a planned display, and that is exactly what they had on Sunday at the Hilton Hotel and Conference Center in Downtown Scranton. People showed up for the 10th Electric City Reptile Expo. They checked out [...]

shorts.title: Report it: Send your photos of storm damage
shorts.title_distilled: Report it: Send your photos of storm damage.
shorts.description: (WBRE/WYOU) — As rain and thunderstorms pass through northeastern Pennsylvania, residents may see some damage, and 28/22 News wants to see it. Head to 28/22’s Report It! page and submit your videos and photos of any storm damage in your area. Those submissions will be reviewed and appear in this article, and you might see [...]
